geography.data_source: MCGM ward boundaries (F/North, F/South, G/North, G/South wards mapped to numeric IDs); area from MCGM Development Plan 2034

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Mumbai suburban district (F and G wards aggregated); density = population/area; household size from NSSO 76th Round Mumbai urban mid-income estimates; literacy from Census 2011; SC/ST from Census 2011 SC/ST tables

income_profile.data_source: Median from PLFS 2022-23 Mumbai urban mid-income quintile; distribution reflecting mixed-income character of Dadar-Parel belt (former mill lands redeveloped into premium + retention of working-class pockets); informal rate from NSSO 78th Round; occupations reflect KEM/Sion hospital belt, former textile mill area, Dadar junction commerce

commute_profile.data_source: Dadar is the only station on both Western and Central Railway; MCTS 2016 mode share data for F/G ward TAZs; metro Line 3 stations from MMRDA; car ownership from Census 2011 household assets

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Mid-range sensitivity reflecting mixed income; high political mobilisation from Dadar's historical union/political activity (Shiv Sena founded here); fare sensitivity from BEST/suburban rail ridership elasticity estimates; institutional trust from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Mumbai mid-income sub-sample

social_network_parameters.data_source: Mixed network type reflects transit hub character — commuters from diverse zones interact at Dadar junction; clustering moderate due to mix of old residential colonies and new developments; cross-income bridging higher than dense low-income zones due to gentrification of mill lands

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Dadar Phool Gully is Mumbai's largest wholesale flower market; footfall from MCGM market survey and APMC records
Vendors surrounding Dadar station (both WR and CR sides); footfall from Western Railway + Central Railway combined Dadar station boarding/alighting data ~600K daily
Informal service economy around KEM Hospital and Tata Memorial — medical shops, food stalls, patient lodges; estimated from hospital OPD footfall data
Food vendors and lunch stall economy serving Lower Parel corporate parks (Phoenix Mills, One Indiabulls); estimated from office worker lunch-hour pedestrian patterns
Worli Koliwada fishing village — traditional fishing economy; employment from Maharashtra Fisheries Department village-level data
Dadar West retail market (Swadeshi Market, Shivaji Park area); MCGM trade license data and BEST ridership at Dadar West bus stops

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Transit Hub/Mixed zone template from AGENT_SPEC.md; Dadar-Parel-Worli is Mumbai's archetypal transit hub with mixed economic activity

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 counts from MCGM corporator data for F/G wards, Mumbai union registration records for Parel industrial belt, KEM Hospital administration structure
